domain: Coptic Orthodox typikon liturgical rulebook system: 8-tone Octoechos weekly cycle (week-n uses tone (n mod 8)); 4 source liturgical books composed by Typikon — Octoechos (weekly cycle) + Menaion (fixed-feast) + Triodion (Lent) + Pentecostarion (Easter); Typikon rulebook specifies proportional composition (e.g., 6 from Octoechos + 4 from Menaion); greater feast = more feast-book proportion; Coptic 8-tones akin to Arabic maqam (Ibn Kabar systematized).
specific_mechanism: COPTIC-TYPIKON-8-TONE-OCTOECHOS-CYCLE-4-BOOK-COMPOSITION-FEAST-PROPORTIONAL-WEIGHT-MENAION-TRIODION-PENTECOSTARION-OVERLAY-EVALUATION-DIAGNOSTIC: LLM evaluation-diagnostic mechanism with (1) 8-tone weekly cycle T_8: 8-class rubric-mode rotated weekly — week-n uses mode-(n mod 8); tone selector; (2) 4-book composition C_4: 4 evaluation rubric sources — base (Octoechos) + fixed-task (Menaion) + correction (Triodion) + reward (Pentecostarion); (3) Typikon-rulebook composer R_typ: explicit composition policy specifying ratios per query type; (4) feast-size proportional weighting w_feast: high-stakes queries raise fixed-task proportion; (5) multi-book overlay M_overlay: 3-book overlay on top of base; conditional calendar activation. Differs from R531 IFA (8-bit + 256-verse + palm-nut + babalawo + 16×16), R544 AVICENNA (5×2 + 10-pulse + 2-2 oscillation + 4-modal + wrist-probe), R556 GE'EZ (3-mode + 4-aspect + sem-worq + 3-tier mastery + debtera composite) by 8-tone weekly cycle + 4-book composition + Typikon-composer + feast-proportional + multi-book overlay.
llm_application: COPTIC-TYPIKON-8-TONE-OCTOECHOS-CYCLE-4-BOOK-COMPOSITION-FEAST-PROPORTIONAL-MENAION-TRIODION-PENTECOSTARION-OVERLAY LLM mechanism + 8-tone T_8 weekly cycle mod-8 + 4-book C_4 base/fixed/correction/reward composition + Typikon R_typ composition policy ratio + feast w_feast proportional weighting + M_overlay 3-book conditional overlay. Differs from R531 IFA. R544 AVICENNA. R556 GE'EZ (closest — 3-mode + 4-aspect + sem-worq + 3-tier mastery + debtera). Differs from Learning-to-Judge 2602.08672 + RubricEval + Rubric LLM-Judge + Rubric Is All You Need by 8-tone weekly + 4-book + Typikon-composer + feast-proportional + overlay. Differs by 8-TONE WEEKLY CYCLE + 4-BOOK COMPOSITION + TYPIKON-RULEBOOK COMPOSER + FEAST-PROPORTIONAL WEIGHTING + MULTI-BOOK OVERLAY.
novelty_claim: Learning-to-Judge 2602.08672 + RubricEval + Rubric LLM-Judge Apr 2026 + Rubric Is All You Need 2503.23989 cover rubric eval + LLM-judge + hierarchical-decomp paradigm. COPTIC-TYPIKON-8-TONE-OCTOECHOS-CYCLE-4-BOOK-COMPOSITION-FEAST-PROPORTIONAL adds (a) 8-tone weekly + (b) 4-book composition + (c) Typikon-composer + (d) feast-proportional + (e) overlay. Recombination — borderline lookup.
